title: asystasia chelonoides var. quadrangularis
intro: Asystasia chelonoides var. quadrangularis is a variant of the Asystasia chelonoides plant, commonly known as the 'Golden Dewdrop' or 'African Violet', which is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Asystasia chelonoides var. quadrangularis include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and protect against infections. In herbal preparations, the leaves are often used to make infusions, decoctions, or teas, which can be consumed to harness the plant's medicinal properties and health benefits.
